scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @yuebot/shared build && pnpm --filter @yuebot/livepix build && pnpm --filter @yuebot/database build && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @yuebot/shared build && pnpm --filter @yuebot/livepix build && pnpm --filter @yuebot/database build && node --test --import tsx src/**/*.test.ts
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @yuebot/shared build && pnpm --filter @yuebot/livepix build && pnpm --filter @yuebot/database db:generate && pnpm --filter @yuebot/database build && tsc --noEmit
